policy_yaml:
version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule use-cargo-build-run:
    kill exec "rustc" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "cargo"
    kill exec "make" if AGENT
    kill exec "just" if AGENT
    kill exec "**/target/debug/*" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "cargo"
    kill exec "**/target/release/*" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "cargo"
    because "Build with `cargo build` and run with `cargo run`; do not invoke rustc, make/just, or target binaries directly."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule stable-rust-toolchain-only:
    kill exec "cargo" "+nightly" if AGENT
    kill exec "rustc" "+nightly" if AGENT
    kill exec "rustdoc" "+nightly" if AGENT
    kill exec "rustfmt" "+nightly" if AGENT
    kill exec "clippy-driver" "+nightly" if AGENT
    kill exec "rustup" "nightly" if AGENT
    kill exec "rustup" "+nightly" if AGENT
    kill exec "**/toolchains/nightly*/bin/*" if AGENT
    kill write file "**/rust-toolchain" if AGENT
    kill write file "**/rust-toolchain.toml" if AGENT
    because "Use the stable Rust toolchain only; do not invoke or configure nightly features."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule regenerate-hf-models-json:
    kill write file "data/hf_models.json" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "python3"
    kill write file "**/data/hf_models.json" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "python3"
    kill write file "**/hf_models.json" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "python3"
    because "Do not manually edit `hf_models.json`; regenerate it with `python3 scripts/scrape_hf_models.py`."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule model-database-refresh:
    block write file "**/data/hf_models.json" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "**/python3"
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "**/python3" since write "**/scripts/scrape_hf_models.py" or write "**/data/hf_models.json"
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "**/jq" since write "**/data/hf_models.json"
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "**/cargo" since write "**/scripts/scrape_hf_models.py" or write "**/data/hf_models.json"
    because "model database changes must be regenerated by the scraper, inspected, and followed by cargo build before committing"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule filter-cross-file-reminder:
    notify write file "**/llmfit-tui/src/tui_app.rs" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/llmfit-tui/src/tui_events.rs" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/llmfit-tui/src/tui_ui.rs" if AGENT
    because "new filters must be wired through App state, filtering, keybindings, UI widget, and status bar help"

  rule filter-change-fresh-check:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "**/cargo" since write "**/llmfit-tui/src/tui_app.rs" or write "**/llmfit-tui/src/tui_events.rs" or write "**/llmfit-tui/src/tui_ui.rs"
    because "run a fresh cargo check or build after TUI filter changes before committing"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule cli-subcommand-reminder:
    notify write file "**/llmfit-tui/src/main.rs" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/llmfit-tui/src/display.rs" if AGENT
    because "new CLI subcommands must update the Commands enum, dispatch arm, and display output path"

  rule cli-subcommand-fresh-check:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "**/cargo" since write "**/llmfit-tui/src/main.rs" or write "**/llmfit-tui/src/display.rs"
    because "run a fresh cargo check or build after CLI subcommand changes before committing"
